polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words.

We need to interpret overall market sentiment based on data. The data includes Fed rates: high probability of no change (74%) vs increase 25bps (25%). So expectation of stable rates (bullish for equities). Israel-Iran ceasefire continues through July 25: 76% yes (positive for stability). US invade Iran before 2027: 29% low (low risk). Kharg Island no longer under Iranian control: only 3% (very low chance). Mojtaba Khamenei head of state end 2026: 72% yes (expected continuity). Mitch McConnell steps down: 42% (moderate). WTI crude oil hit $95 in July: 63% yes (expect higher oil prices, could be inflationary but also indicates demand). Overall sentiment seems moderately bullish: stable Fed, ceasefire, low invasion risk, continuity in Iran leadership, oil price up. Mixed? The only bearish signals: Mitch McConnell step down 42% (uncertainty), oil price up could be inflationary but still bullish for energy. I'd say Bullish.
